summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the new unified Orders Dashboard completed. All 17+ features tested successfully. The Orders page displays 87 orders from 6 marketplaces (Amazon, Flipkart, Coupang, Snapdeal, Meesho, Myntra) with full filtering, search, pagination, bulk actions, and order detail drawer functionality.
passed_tests: Unified orders table shows all 87 orders from all marketplaces
Quick filter tab 'All Orders' shows 87 orders
Quick filter tab 'Pending Fulfillment' shows 63 orders (filters correctly)
Quick filter tab 'Shipped' shows 12 orders (filters correctly)
Quick filter tab 'Cancelled' shows 12 orders (filters correctly)
Quick filter tab 'Returns' shows 12 orders (filters correctly)
Marketplace filter dropdown opens and shows all 6 marketplace options
Marketplace filter - Amazon selection filters to 15 orders
Order Status filter dropdown works (tested with Shipped status = 12 orders)
Fulfillment filter dropdown works (tested with Unfulfilled = 55 orders)
Date Range filter dropdown works
Clear filters button appears when filters are active
Clear filters resets all filters back to 87 orders
Search by Order ID (ORD-100005) returns 1 order
Search by customer name (Amit) returns 6 orders
Search by SKU (RBK-SHO) returns 9 orders
Search by product title (Running Shoes) returns 17 orders
Pagination visible with page 1, 2, ... 9 buttons
Next page button navigates to page 2 (order ord-10)
Previous page button navigates back to page 1 (order ord-0)
Checkbox selection shows bulk action bar with count
Multiple checkbox selection (3 orders) shows '3 selected'
Bulk action bar shows 'Mark Fulfilled', 'Print Labels', 'Export' buttons
Select all checkbox selects all 10 orders on current page
Deselect all hides bulk action bar
Order row click opens order detail drawer
Drawer shows 'Order Details' title
Drawer shows Order ID (ORD-100000) with copy button
Drawer shows Marketplace section with logo and name
Drawer shows Product info (title, quantity, SKU)
Drawer shows Order Timeline (5 steps: Placed, Confirmed, Packed, Shipped, Delivered)
Drawer shows Customer section (name, phone, address)
Drawer shows Shipping & Delivery (method, ship by, deliver by, fulfillment)
Drawer shows Payment section (Prepaid/COD, amount, status)
Drawer close via X button works
Drawer close via backdrop click works
Drawer close via Escape key works
Marketplace icons visible in Source column for all orders
Status badges present: Pending (amber), Confirmed (blue), Packed (violet), Shipped (sky), Delivered (emerald), Cancelled (red), Returned (orange)
Fulfillment badges present: Unfulfilled (amber), Fulfilled (emerald), Partial (violet)
critical_code_review_comments: OrdersPage.tsx is well-structured at 1016 lines - consider splitting into smaller components if it grows further
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Status and fulfillment badge color mappings are consistent and accessible
Order timeline data is hardcoded - could be dynamically generated from order status in future iterations
Date filter 'Last 30 days' shows 0 orders because mock data uses dates from Nov 2025 - not a bug, just mock data timing
seed_data_creation: All data MOCKED using generateMockOrders() function in OrdersPage.tsx - generates 87 orders across 6 marketplaces
context_for_next_testing_agent: Orders page fully tested. Key data-testids: orders-page, orders-title, quick-filter-tabs, tab-{key}, marketplace-filter, status-filter, fulfillment-filter, date-filter, order-search-input, clear-filters-btn, results-count, orders-table, order-row-ord-{n}, order-check-ord-{n}, order-marketplace-ord-{n}, select-all-checkbox, pagination, prev-page-btn, next-page-btn, page-{n}-btn, bulk-action-bar, selected-count, bulk-mark-fulfilled, bulk-print-labels, bulk-export, order-detail-drawer, drawer-title, drawer-order-id, drawer-marketplace, order-timeline, drawer-close-btn, drawer-backdrop. All 87 mock orders distributed across Amazon, Flipkart, Coupang, Snapdeal, Meesho, Myntra with various statuses and fulfillment states.

mocked_api_info.details: Entire app is UI-only. All order data is generated by generateMockOrders() function in OrdersPage.tsx creating 87 orders. No backend APIs - all data is in-memory mock data.
